name: Memory (aetnamem)
description: Auditable agent memory — auto-recall and auto-capture backed by the aetnamem engine: quarantined untrusted content, verifiable deletion with receipts, hash-chained audit log.

command.description: Executable that serves the engine (absolute path if not on PATH, e.g. /path/to/venv/bin/aetna000). Use a python binary together with commandArgs ["-m","aetnamem.cli","mcp",...] as an alternative.

commandArgs.description: Override the full argument list. Default: ["mcp", "--db", <dbPath>, "--subject", <subject>]

dbPath.description: SQLite database path (also auditable from outside OpenClaw via `aetna000 verify`)

subject.description: Subject id used for all memory operations (single-user assistant)

maxChars.description: Total character budget for the injected block

minScore.description: Minimum relevance score; 0.3 requires a lexical match (priors alone never inject)

timeoutMs.description: Recall timeout; on timeout the turn proceeds without injection

persona.description: L3 persona snapshot injected alongside recall

ttlSeconds.description: Persona cache lifetime; also invalidated whenever new memory is captured

captureAssistant.description: Log assistant replies to the audit chain (digest only, never stored as memory)
